scope.goal: Migrate the final eleven unstandardized full-report Markdown renderers to the shared verification report builder without changing normalized public output.
nonGoals: No route, loader, schema, fixture, or upstream contract change
No Java or mini-kv write, build, test, start, or stop
No waiver decision for the three composition-only renderers; that belongs to the N1 closeout version

necessityProof.blockerResolved: N1 still contained eleven full-report renderers with hand-assembled title, metadata, section, message, and next-action scaffolding.
necessityProof.consumer: The N1 closeout census and the subsequent N5 source-health phase.
necessityProof.whyExistingReportCouldNotBeReusedAsIs: The public reports are distinct, but their repeated Markdown skeleton can be delegated to verificationReportBuilder while domain-specific rows remain local helpers.
necessityProof.stopCondition: After this batch, only the three previously identified composition-only profile-section aggregators may remain unstandardized.

implementation.builderChange: Added headingLeadingBlankLine=false as an opt-in section control so legacy reports with intentionally adjacent section headings remain byte-equivalent; default spacing is unchanged.

validation.command: npx vitest run test/rendererMigrationV2183Parity.test.ts test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/rendererCensusScript.test.ts --maxWorkers=2 --reporter=verbose
validation.result: 3 files passed, 15 tests passed; all eleven frozen normalized fingerprints matched and the negative census gate failed as required

validation.command: npx vitest run <eleven migrated service test files> --maxWorkers=2
